finding_text: The distribution system is deficient in that each lot of drug product cannot be readily determined to facilitate its recall if necessary.

finding_text: Procedures designed to prevent microbiological contamination of drug products purporting to be sterile do not include adequate validation of the sterilization process.

finding_text: The written stability testing program is not followed.

finding_text: Written procedures are lacking which describe in sufficient detail the receipt, identification, storage, handling, sampling, testing, approval, and rejection ofcomponents, drug product containers, and closures.

finding_text: Laboratory records do not include a complete record of all data secured in the course ofeach test, including all graphs, charts, and spectra from laboratory instrumentation, properly identified to show the specific component, in-process material, lot tested, and drug product tested.

finding_text_ko: 무균으로 표방되는 의약품의 미생물 오염을 방지하도록 설계된 절차가 수립, 문서화 및 준수되지 않았다.

finding_text: Clothing of personnel engaged in the of drug products is not appropriate for the duties they perform.
finding_text_ko: 의약품 관련 작업에 종사하는 작업자의 복장이 수행 업무에 적합하지 않았다.

finding_text: Protective apparel is not worn as necessary to protect drug products from contamination.
finding_text_ko: 의약품을 오염으로부터 보호하기 위해 필요한 보호복이 착용되지 않았다.

finding_text: The labels of your outsourcing facility's drug products are deficient.
finding_text_ko: 외주제조시설 의약품의 라벨이 미흡했다.

finding_text: The ISO-classified areas have difficult to clean, particle-generating, or visibly dirty equipment or surfaces.
finding_text_ko: ISO 등급 구역에는 세척이 어렵고 입자를 발생시키거나 육안으로 더러운 장비 또는 표면이 있었다.

finding_text: Procedures designed to prevent objectionable microorganisms in drug products not required to be sterile are not established, written and followed.
finding_text_ko: 무균일 필요가 없는 의약품에서 유해 미생물을 방지하도록 설계된 절차가 수립, 문서화 및 준수되지 않았다.

finding_text: Your outsourcing facility has not submitted a complete report to FDA identifying all products compounded at your facility during the previous six months as required by section 503B(b)(2)(A).
finding_text_ko: 외주제조시설은 section 503B(b)(2)(A)에서 요구하는 대로 이전 6개월 동안 시설에서 조제한 모든 제품을 식별하는 완전한 보고서를 FDA에 제출하지 않았다.

finding_text: Containers and closures are not reviewed for conformance with all appropriate written procedures.
finding_text_ko: 용기와 마개가 모든 적절한 서면 절차에 부합하는지 검토되지 않았다.

finding_text: Specific identification tests are not conducted on components that have been accepted based on the supplier's report of analysis.

finding_text: Laboratory controls do not include the establishment of scientifically sound and appropriate test procedures designed to assure that drug products conform to appropriate standards of identity, strength, quality and purity.

finding_text: You produced beta-lactam drugs without providing adequate cleaning of utensils to prevent cross-contamination.
finding_text_ko: 교차오염을 방지하기 위한 적절한 기구 세척 없이 beta-lactam 의약품을 생산했다.

finding_text: Written production and process control procedures are not followed in the execution ofproduction and process control functions and documented at the time ofperformance.

finding_text: There is a failure to thoroughly review the failure of a batch or any of its components to meet any of its specifications whether or not the batch has been already distributed.

finding_text: Deviation from the procedural requirements of a decree of injWlction.
finding_text_ko: injunction decree의 절차 요건으로부터 deviation(일탈)이 있었다.

finding_text: Procedures for design verification have not been adequately established.
finding_text_ko: 설계 verification(검증) 절차가 적절히 수립되지 않았다.

finding_text: Drug product containers were not sterilized and processed to remove pyrogenic properties to assure that they are suitable for their intended use.
finding_text_ko: 의약품 용기가 의도된 용도에 적합하도록 보장하기 위해 멸균 및 pyrogenic property 제거 공정을 거치지 않았다.

finding_text: The labels of your outsourcing facility's drug products do not contain the following information required by section 503B(a)(10) ofthe Act: A.
finding_text_ko: 외주제조시설 의약품의 라벨에는 Act section 503B(a)(10)에서 요구하는 다음 정보가 포함되지 않았다: A.

finding_text: Aseptic processing areas are deficient regarding air supply that is filtered through high-efficiency particulate air filters under positive pressure.
finding_text_ko: aseptic processing area(무균 공정 구역)는 양압 상태에서 HEPA 필터로 여과된 공기 공급이 미흡했다.

finding_text: The quality control unit lacks responsibility to approve and reject all procedures or specifications impacting on the identity, strength, quality and purity of drug products.
finding_text_ko: 품질관리부서는 의약품의 확인, 함량, 품질 및 순도에 영향을 미치는 모든 절차 또는 규격을 승인 및 부적합 처리할 책임이 부족했다.

finding_text: Approved components are not retested or reexamined as appropriate for identity, strength, quality and purity after stora.ge for long periods with subsequent approval or rejection by the quality control unit Specifically, A) Expired Active Phannaceuticallngredients were observed on 3/3fl0 15 near the production area.
finding_text_ko: 승인된 원자재가 장기간 보관 후 확인, 함량, 품질 및 순도에 대해 적절히 재시험 또는 재검사되고 품질관리부서의 후속 승인 또는 부적합 처리를 받지 않았다. 구체적으로 3/30/15에 생산 구역 근처에서 유효기간이 지난 Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients가 관찰되었다.

finding_text: Aseptic processing areac; are deficient regarding the system for cleaning and disinfecting the room and equipment to produce aseptic conditions.
finding_text_ko: aseptic processing area(무균 공정 구역)는 무균 조건을 만들기 위한 작업실 및 장비의 세척·소독 시스템이 미흡했다.

finding_text: Clothing of personnel engaged in the manufacturing, process ing, and packing of drug products is not appropriate ----------~~~~~~~-------------,·~~~~~~~~~~~------1-7.~~~---; EMPLOYEE(S} SIGNATURE
finding_text_ko: 의약품의 제조, 가공 및 포장에 종사하는 작업자의 복장이 수행 업무에 적합하지 않다는 지적사항과 EMPLOYEE(S) SIGNATURE 관련 OCR 문구가 기록되었다.

finding_text: Approved components are not retested or reexamined as appropriate for identity, strength, quality and purity after storage for long periods with subsequent approval or rejection by the quality control unit Specifically, There is no data to support the three month expiration date...
finding_text_ko: 승인된 원자재가 장기간 보관 후 확인, 함량, 품질 및 순도에 대해 적절히 재시험 또는 재검사되고 품질관리부서의 후속 승인 또는 부적합 처리를 받지 않았다. 구체적으로 3개월 유효기간을 뒷받침하는 자료가 없었다.

finding_text: There is a failure to thoroughly review any unexplained discrepancy whether or not the batch has been aheady distributed.
finding_text_ko: 원인 불명의 불일치에 대해, 해당 배치가 이미 출하되었는지 여부와 관계없이 철저한 검토가 이루어지지 않았다.

finding_text: Aseptic processing areas are deficient regarding the system for cleaning and disinfecting the room and equipment to produce aseptic conditions.

finding_text: Written production and process control procedures are not followed in the execution ofproduction and process control functions.
finding_text_ko: 생산 및 공정관리 기능 수행 시 서면 생산 및 공정관리 절차가 준수되지 않았다.

finding_text: Routine calibration of electronic equipment is not performed according to a written program designed to assure proper performance.
finding_text_ko: 전자 장비의 정기 교정이 적절한 성능을 보장하도록 설계된 서면 프로그램에 따라 수행되지 않았다.

finding_text: The procedure used for cleaning and sanitizing ofequipment has not been shown to provide adequate cleaning and sanitizing treatment.
finding_text_ko: 장비의 세척 및 sanitizing(위생처리)에 사용된 절차가 적절한 세척 및 sanitizing 처리를 제공하는 것으로 입증되지 않았다.

finding_text: There are no written procedures for production and process controls designed to assure that the drug products have the identity, strength, quality, and purity they purport or are represented to possess.
finding_text_ko: 의약품이 표방하거나 표시한 확인, 함량, 품질 및 순도를 갖도록 보장하기 위한 생산 및 공정관리 서면 절차가 없었다.

finding_text: Procedures designed to prevent microbiological coniamination of drug products purporting to be sterile are not established.

finding_text: Investigations of an unexplained discrepancy did not eh1:end to other drug products that may have been associated with the specific failure or discrepancy.' ,,' ' ..

finding_text: IS0-5 classified areas were not certified under dynamic conditions.
finding_text_ko: ISO-5 등급 구역이 동적 조건에서 인증되지 않았다.

finding_text: You did not make adequate product evolution and take remedial action where actionable microbial contamination was found to be present in the ISO 5 classified aseptic processing area during aseptic production.
finding_text_ko: 무균 생산 중 ISO 5 등급 aseptic processing area(무균 공정 구역)에 조치 가능한 미생물 오염이 존재하는 것으로 확인되었을 때 적절한 제품 평가를 수행하고 remedial action(개선조치)을 취하지 않았다.

finding_text: Equipment and utensils are not cleaned and sanitized at appropriate intervals to prevent contamination that would alter the safety, identity, strength, quality or purity of the drug product.
finding_text_ko: 장비와 기구가 의약품의 안전성, 확인, 함량, 품질 또는 순도를 변경할 수 있는 오염을 방지하도록 적절한 간격으로 세척 및 sanitizing(위생처리)되지 않았다.

finding_text: Results of stability testing are not used in determining expiration dates.
finding_text_ko: 안정성 시험 결과가 유효기간을 결정하는 데 사용되지 않았다.

finding_text: Employees did not wash hands thoroughly in an adequate hand-washing facility at any time their hands may have become soiled or contaminated.

finding_text: Failure to operate fans and other air-blowing equipment in a manner that minimizes the potential for contaminating food and food-contact surfaces.

finding_text: Procedures designed to prevent microbiological contamination of drug products purporting to be sterile do not include adequate validation of the sterilization process.

finding_text_ko: 오염 또는 혼입을 방지하는 데 필요한 분리 또는 지정 구역이 미흡했다.

finding_text: GMP training is not conducted on a continuing basis to assure that employees remain familiar with CG~ requirements applicable to them.
finding_text_ko: 직원이 자신에게 적용되는 CGMP 요건을 계속 숙지하도록 보장하기 위해 지속적인 GMP 교육이 실시되지 않았다.

finding_text: Aseptic processing areas are deficient regarding the system for monitoring environmental conditions.
finding_text_ko: aseptic processing area(무균 공정 구역)는 환경 조건 모니터링 시스템이 미흡했다.

finding_text: Equipment and utensils are not maintained at appropriate intervals to prevent contamination that would alter the safety, identity, strength, quality or purity ofthe drug product.
finding_text_ko: 장비와 기구가 의약품의 안전성, 확인, 함량, 품질 또는 순도를 변경할 수 있는 오염을 방지하도록 적절한 간격으로 유지관리되지 않았다.

finding_text: Written production and process control procedures are not followed in the execution ofproduction and process control functions and documented at the time ofperfo1mance.
finding_text_ko: 생산 및 공정관리 기능 수행 시 서면 생산 및 공정관리 절차가 준수되지 않았고 수행 시점에 문서화되지 않았다.

finding_text: TYPE ESTABLISHMENT INSPECTED Rx Drug Manufacturer The written stability program for drug prodncts does not describe the storage conditions for samples retained for testing.
finding_text_ko: TYPE ESTABLISHMENT INSPECTED Rx Drug Manufacturer에서 의약품에 대한 서면 안정성 프로그램이 시험용 보관 검체의 보관 조건을 설명하지 않았다.

finding_text: The labels of your outsourcing facility's drug products are deficient.
finding_text_ko: 외주제조시설 의약품의 라벨이 미흡했다.

finding_text: Aseptic processing areas a re deficient regarding the system for monitoring environmental conditions.
finding_text_ko: aseptic processing area(무균 공정 구역)는 환경 조건 모니터링 시스템이 미흡했다.

finding_text: Drug product containers or closures are reactive so as to alter the safety, identity, strength, quality, and purity of the drug beyond the official or established requirements.
finding_text_ko: 의약품 용기 또는 마개가 의약품의 안전성, 확인, 함량, 품질 및 순도를 공식 또는 설정 요건을 벗어나 변경할 만큼 반응성이 있었다.

finding_text: There is a failure to thoroughly review any unexplained discrepancy and the failure of a batch or any of its components to meet any of its specifications whether or not the batch has been already distnbuted.
finding_text_ko: 배치(batch) 또는 그 구성성분이 규격에 부합하지 못한 경우와 원인 불명의 불일치에 대해, 해당 배치가 이미 출하되었는지 여부와 관계없이 철저한 검토가 이루어지지 않았다.

finding_text: Drug products failing to meet established.
finding_text_ko: 설정된 기준에 부합하지 않는 의약품과 관련된 불완전 문구가 기록되었다.

finding_text: Procedures describing the handling of written and oral complaints related to drug products are not written or followed.
finding_text_ko: 의약품 관련 서면 및 구두 불만 처리를 설명한 절차가 작성 또는 준수되지 않았다.

finding_text: Testing and release ofdrug product for distribution do not include appropriate laboratory determination ofsatisfactory conformance to the identity and strength ofeach active ingredient prior to release.
finding_text_ko: 출하 전 의약품의 시험 및 출하승인에는 각 활성성분의 확인 및 함량에 대한 적합성을 확인하는 적절한 실험실 판정이 포함되지 않았다.
